section: DM and Collector West Tripura Dr. Sandeep Mahatme receives award
text:
# DM and Collector West Tripura Dr. Sandeep Mahatme receives award

DM and Collector West Tripura Dr. Sandeep Mahatme receives award for Mission Indradhanush from Union Health Minister Dr Harshavardhan in New Delhi on 31/10/2019.
content:
# DM and Collector West Tripura Dr. Sandeep Mahatme receives award

DM and Collector West Tripura Dr. Sandeep Mahatme receives award for Mission Indradhanush from Union Health Minister Dr Harshavardhan in New Delhi on 31/10/2019.
